rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - snap-confine + systemd-tmpfiles = root (CVE-2026-3888)
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/31
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*cron.daily*'
            - '*ld.so.preload*'
            - '*lib.exchange*'
            - '*linux-gnu.exchange*'
            - '*seclists.org*'
            - '*session-145.scope*'
            - '*session-33.scope*'
            - '*snap.firefox.hook.configure*'
            - '*snap.snap-store.hook.configure*'
            - '*snap.snap-store.user*'
            - '*snap.whatever*'
            - '*snap.whatever.scope*'
            - '*user-1001.slice*'
            - '*user.slice*'
            - '*x-snapd.origin*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
